care.fertilizer_type: Dilute fertilizers following instructions, apply 1-2 times monthly in spring and autumn

care.tips: Remove dead and yellowish leaves and withered flowers | Similar plants: Bougainvillea spectabilis | Native to: NCB, BZC GO, BZE PB, ALG, BZE FN
common_pests: Unhealthy, pale-looking, or mottled growth on bougainvilleas growing indoors, in greenhouses or conservatories, is likely to be caused by scale insect or red spider mite
This is known as honeydew and is exuded by aphids and other sap suckers
The brown scales of scale insect can be found under leaves or in leaf joints, while red spider mite is barely visible to the naked eye and causes the leaves to mottle
Alan Titchmarsh offers advice on dealing with mealy bug on bougainvillea in this video
care.used_for: ["It is used as a botanical insecticide. In Mexico", "an infusion is used to treat gastrointestinal and respiratory problems."]
care.used_for_details: It is used as a botanical insecticide. In Mexico, an infusion is used to treat gastrointestinal and respiratory problems.
care.pruning_info: The main time to prune bougainvillea is late winter to early spring, around the end of February. Bougainvilleas bear flowers on the current season's growth, which is why it's important to prune before growth begins. Start by removing any dead, damaged or diseased growth. Cut back to a bud or leaf joint. Next prune back any shoots that are outgrowing their space, cutting back to a bud or leaf joint. If the plant is congested, remove some of the older shoots where they join the main stem

description: Winged achenes are 1-1.5 cm, elongate, 5-ribbed containing 1 seed and are distributed by wind and water.

care.used_for_details: The extract and decoction of this plant have been used as fertility control among the tribal people in many countries. It also is believed to have anticancer, antihepatotoxic, anti-inflammatory, antihyperlipidemic, antimicrobial, antioxidant, and antiulcer properties. Bougainvillea spectabilis conta

Bougainvilleas bear flowers on the current season's growth, which is why it's important to prune before growth begins. Start by removing any dead, damaged or diseased growth. Cut back to a bud or leaf joint. Next prune back any shoots that are outgrowing their space, cutting back to a bud or leaf joint. If the plant is congested, remove some of the older shoots where they join the main stem

description: Mirabilis jalapa, the marvel of Peru or four o'clock flower, is the most commonly grown ornamental species of Mirabilis plant, and is available in a range of colors. Mirabilis in Latin means wonderful and Jalapa is the state capital of Veracruz in Mexico. Mirabilis jalapa is believed to have been cultivated by the Aztecs for medicinal and ornamental purposes.
In mathematics, a pullback is either of two related processes: precomposition and fiber-product; precomposition is a special case of the general fiber-product. Its dual is a pushforward.
